user.title: NMA Mobile Credentials
user.description: Connect to the NMA API. Use the development URL while testing.

error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to the NMA API.
error.company_not_found: No company with that ID exists at this endpoint (404).
error.server_unavailable: The API gateway returned 502/503/504. The backend is unreachable or temporarily down — check the URL and that the API is up.
error.invalid_url: Base URL must start with http:// or https://.
error.invalid_company_id: Company ID must be a valid UUID.

abort.already_configured: This (base URL, company ID) is already configured.

init.title: NMA options
init.description: Disable people/credentials fetching if you only care about company status and the ACS WebSocket.

refresh.name: Refresh NMA data
refresh.description: Force-refresh one or all NMA config entries.

entry_id.name: Entry ID
entry_id.description: Optional NMA config entry ID. If omitted, every NMA entry is refreshed.
